text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah... It's just you. I thought you<n>were another
fan.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There's a surprising number of my fans<n>here. Or I
guess, fans of my modeling.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Gotta say, though... Having to smile<n>through
those conversations is high-key<n>tiring.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, I don't have to do all that in frontof you... I can be the real me.
